## Metaphor Name
What's the real-world domain this metaphor maps to?

## Mapping
Describe how infrastructure concepts map to your metaphor:
- Cluster → ?
- Node → ?
- Service → ?
- Container → ?

## Visual Style
Describe the aesthetic: colors, layout direction, animation style.

## Reference
Any real-world examples, images, or inspirations.

## Why this metaphor?
What makes this metaphor useful or interesting for understanding infrastructure?
